title: Abacus Range Galvanised Garden Wire 1.2mm x 20m Long, Silver Rust Resistant Metal Wire Coil Ideal for Plants, Crafting, Netting, Repairing, Gardening, Hanging, and Fencing
features: GARDEN SUPPORT: This 1.2mm diameter galvanised wire is ideal for supporting climbing plants and shrubs, ensuring your garden stays neat and organised while promoting healthy plant growth

LONG DURABILITY: With a 20m length, this gardening wire is made from rust-resistant metal, ensuring it withstands harsh weather conditions and provides long-term durability for all your gardening needs
MULTI-PURPOSE USE: Perfect for crafting, netting, and repairing this versatile wire cable can be used for various DIY projects, making it a valuable addition to your toolkit
HANGING SOLUTION: Use this sturdy hanging wire for baskets, decorations, and other garden ties, providing a secure and reliable solution for all your outdoor and indoor hanging needs
RELIABLE FENCING: Ideal for creating or repairing fences, this strong galvanised wire rope kit offers excellent support and security, ensuring your garden and property are well-protected
description: Abacus Range presents our premium 1.2mm diameter galvanized garden wire, a versatile and essential addition to your gardening and DIY toolkit. Spanning 20 meters in length, this silver wire is crafted from rust-resistant metal, ensuring it can withstand the elements and provide long-lasting durability for various applications. Perfect for gardening enthusiasts, this green garden wire is ideal for supporting climbing plants and shrubs, helping you maintain a neat and organized garden while promoting healthy plant growth. Its sturdy construction makes it suitable for creating trellises, training vines, and securing garden structures, ensuring your plants have the support they need to thrive. Beyond gardening, this multi-purpose wire is a fantastic solution for crafting, netting, and repairing projects. Whether you're designing decorative items, fixing household items, or creating custom crafts, this gardening wire for climbing plants offers the flexibility and strength required for a wide range of tasks. Additionally, the galvanized garden wire serves as a reliable hanging solution for baskets, decorations, and other ornaments, both indoors and outdoors. Features - 1.2mm diameter - Galvanized metal - 20m length - Rust-resistant - Silver colour - Plant support Invest in our 1.2mm diameter galvanized garden fence wire and experience its versatility, durability, and reliability for all your gardening, crafting, and household needs.
